# Nikhil Katkuri - Developer Profile

This file provides a structured overview of Nikhil Katkuri's professional background, technical expertise, and project portfolio for AI agents and LLMs.

## Professional Summary

Nikhil Katkuri is a Full-Stack and Android Engineer based in Hyderabad, India. Currently an Android Developer Intern at Galactix Solutions Pvt. Ltd., he specializes in building performant, scalable systems with a strong emphasis on offline-first architectures, CLI developer tooling, and clean backend design.

## Core Competencies

* **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Kotlin.
* **Web:** Next.js, React, Node.js, Express.
* **Mobile:** React Native, Android Development.
* **Systems/Concepts:** Offline-first architecture, AES-256-CBC Cryptography, CLI design, Git internals.

## Project Portfolio

### [Client-to-Provider Cipher](https://nikhilkatkuri.vercel.app/project/client-provider-cipher)

* **Description:** A zero-knowledge CLI utility for local file encryption.
* **Technical Focus:** Implements AES-256-CBC encryption to ensure data privacy before syncing to third-party cloud storage providers.

### [Offline-First Notes App](https://nikhilkatkuri.vercel.app/project/offline-first-notes-app)

* **Description:** A production-grade notes application.
* **Technical Focus:** Prioritizes local-first data persistence and conflict resolution strategies for seamless synchronization in low-connectivity environments.

### [Paperwork](https://nikhilkatkuri.vercel.app/project/paperwork)

* **Description:** A structured document management and workflow automation engine.
* **Technical Focus:** Implements automated categorization, archival logic, and metadata indexing for digitized physical documents.

### [Git Lite CLI](https://nikhilkatkuri.vercel.app/project/git-lite-cli)

* **Description:** A lightweight, functional reimplementation of the Git version control system.
* **Technical Focus:** Focuses on core VCS primitives, including object hashing (SHA), tree object creation, and index management.
